mapper.insert: /* TC_ECS_CLS_CD_Dao_insertClsCdList */ INSERT INTO tc_ecs_cls_cd ( CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM, CLS_CD_DC, USE_YN, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{clsCd}, #{clsCdNm}, #{clsCdDc}, #{useYn}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
mapper.update: /* TC_ECS_CLS_CD_Dao_updateClsCdList */ UPDATE tc_ecs_cls_cd SET CLS_CD_NM = #{clsCdNm}, CLS_CD_DC = #{clsCdDc}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, LAST_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE CLS_CD = #{clsCd}

select.if: SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'

if.test: sysDivCd != null and sysDivCd != '' and (sysDivCd == 'SCM' or sysDivCd == 'SMP' or sysDivCd == 'SMC')

select.if: SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_fms_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_cms_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_lws_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_wfm_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_adt_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD , CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_hrm_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_law_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_mgt_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_stg_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_wcb_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_wqe_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_wri_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_wro_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
SELECT CLS_CD, CLS_CD_NM FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd WHERE CLS_CD_DC LIKE '게시판분류%'
